latin: Claves meas per totam domum quaesivi. sub pulvinaribus, in armariis, post sellam — nusquam erant. amicum vocavi ut me adiuvaret. tum claves in sinu meo inveni. ibi per totum tempus fuerant.

questions.prompt: Where were the keys the whole time?
What did the narrator do before finding them?
questions.target: Searched the whole house and called a friend
choices: Searched the whole house and called a friend

translation: I searched for my keys through the whole house. Under cushions, in closets, behind the chair — they were nowhere. I called a friend to help me. Then I found the keys in my pocket. They had been there the whole time.
